canonical_question: How does VAT/GST apply to SaaS businesses selling internationally?
aliases: GST on cloud software cross-border sales
Digital services tax registration thresholds by country
constraints: Rules vary per country -- verify individually before compliance action
US sales tax is a separate regime
B2B vs B2C determination required per transaction

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User is asking about US state sales tax on SaaS
User is asking about a single-country VAT registration process

inputs_needed.question: Are customers primarily businesses (B2B) or consumers (B2C)?
options: B2C (consumers -- must collect VAT/GST in most jurisdictions)
B2B (businesses -- reverse charge may apply, reducing registration burden)

inputs_needed.question: Which countries or regions do customers reside in?
What is the annual revenue from each target market?

applies_to.user_segment: SaaS companies selling subscriptions to customers in multiple countries
applies_to.context: Any SaaS business with cross-border B2C or B2B digital service sales requiring VAT/GST registration and collection
